title: Forbidden Fruit. I.
content:
Forbidden fruit a flavor has
    That lawful orchards mocks;
    How luscious lies the pea within
    The pod that Duty locks!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Forbidden Fruit. I."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
